summary: Russian operators from the "Rubikon" Center conducted strikes in Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman directions on March 9, 2026, destroying 114 Ukrainian targets. Ukrainian forces used an optical fiber FPV drone to destroy a Polish AHS Krab howitzer in Kharkiv region, while Russian soldiers were hit by two Ukrainian FPV drones simultaneously. Ukrainian military personnel report that Russian "Lightning" drones are difficult to counter with electronic warfare due to their one-way communication, and the BM-35/BM-70 drone attacks on Sumy have decreased, possibly due to production issues, increased EW activity, or Starlink disconnection. Ukraine is sending experts to the Middle East to train Gulf countries in drone countermeasures, while Russian recruitment continues for the "Rubikon" Center, offering 2.3 million ₽ to qualified candidates.
